Pre-dawn
A morning in the field

Ankit
Malviya

Bird photographer & field naturalist, in the wetlands and grasslands of Central India.

Scroll
The way I work

I photograph birds the way you should meet them, quietly, and on their terms. No baiting, no crowding a nest, no chasing a bird off its perch for a frame.

Specific locations are never published, to protect nesting and feeding sites.
